name: Spanish Peanut Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart microwave-safe casserole, combine the sugar, evaporated milk, and butter or margarine.
2. Microwave on Medium-High (70 percent power) for 10 to 13 minutes, stirring every 4 minutes.
3. Add the chocolate chips and stir until they melt.
4. Blend in the marshmallow creme, then fold in the peanuts.
5. Spread the mixture into a buttered baking dish measuring 12 by 8 inches.
6. Cover the dish loosely with wax paper and refrigerate until set.
7. Once set, cut the fudge into 1-inch squares.
8. Store the fudge in an airtight container and refrigerate for up to 1 month.
